subcodes.first_line: ...Ye have written of the Nineteen Day festivities. This Feast is a bringer of joy. It is the groundwork of agreement and unity. It is the key to affection and fellowship
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @praise and encouragement, @Nineteen-Day Feast, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
